INSPECTDOMAINEXPIRATION: Checks that tenant domain registrations are still valid and owned.
INSPECTSIMPHISH: Checks that phishing simulation bypass rules are tightly controlled.
MTCISCLOUDADMIN: Checks that administrator access is tightly controlled.
MTCISCUSTOMERLOCKBOX: Checks that Microsoft support access requires customer approval.
MTHIGHRISKAPPPERMISSIONS: Checks that risky app permissions are reviewed before they are granted.
PRIVILEGEDASSIGNMENTS: Checks that privileged assignments are tightly controlled.
XSPMCRITICALASSETMANAGEMENT: Checks that critical assets are identified and protected.
XSPMDEVICES: Checks that devices are included in exposure management reviews.
XSPMPRIVILEGEDIDENTITIES: Checks that privileged identities are included in exposure management reviews.
